patterns.name: OpenAI API Key
patterns.description: OpenAI API key exposed — unauthorized usage can rack up costs and access your AI models

patterns.name: Stripe Live Key
patterns.description: Stripe live secret key — attacker can process charges and access payment data

patterns.name: Stripe Test Key
patterns.description: Stripe test key exposed — not critical but indicates poor secret management

patterns.name: AWS Access Key ID
patterns.description: AWS access key exposed — can lead to full cloud account compromise

patterns.name: AWS Secret Access Key
patterns.description: AWS secret access key — full access to AWS services

patterns.name: GitHub Personal Access Token
patterns.description: GitHub personal access token — can access repos, create commits, manage settings

patterns.name: GitHub Fine-Grained PAT
patterns.description: GitHub fine-grained PAT — scoped access to GitHub resources

patterns.name: Anthropic API Key
patterns.description: Anthropic API key exposed — unauthorized access to Claude models

patterns.name: Google API Key
patterns.description: Google API key — may grant access to GCP services

patterns.name: Slack Token
patterns.description: Slack token — can read messages, post content, access workspace data

patterns.name: Discord Bot Token
patterns.description: Discord bot token — full control over the bot account

patterns.name: Generic Password Assignment
patterns.description: Hardcoded password found — credentials should be in environment variables

patterns.name: Generic Secret Assignment
patterns.description: Hardcoded secret — should be stored securely, not in source code

patterns.name: Generic Token Assignment
patterns.description: Hardcoded token — should use environment variables or a secrets manager

patterns.name: Generic API Key Assignment
patterns.description: Hardcoded API key — should be injected via environment variables

patterns.name: Private Key File
patterns.description: Private key committed to repo — immediate rotation required

patterns.name: Heroku API Key
patterns.description: Heroku API key — can deploy apps, access databases
